title: The Trial
description:
You join a line of people entering a massive building.

As you pass under a [gold]golden archway[/gold], horns blare, [jitter]confetti explodes[/jitter], and [sine]streamers glide[/sine] down from the ceiling!

"Entrant [blue][a randomly assigned entrant number][/blue], you are the [green]DECIDER[/green] for today's [gold]Trial[/gold]."
notes:
**Multi-page event with three randomly chosen trial scenarios:**

**Scenario 1: Merchant Trial**
A [green]wealthy-looking merchant[/green] is accused of [red]murder[/red]. Evidence is thin and the man appears innocent, but the crowd thirsts for blood.
  - [gold]GUILTY[/gold]: Add [red]Regret[/red] to your deck. Obtain 2 random [gold]Relics[/gold].
  - [gold]INNOCENT[/gold]: Add [red]Shame[/red] to your deck. [gold]Upgrade[/gold] 2 cards.

**Scenario 2: Noble Trial**
A [gold]powerful noble[/gold] faces [purple]corruption charges[/purple]. A note in your pocket promises reward for ruling innocence. The noble barely defends himself and gives a knowing smirk.
  - [gold]GUILTY[/gold]: Heal 10 HP. The [gold]powerful noble[/gold] is [red]beheaded[/red].
  - [gold]INNOCENT[/gold]: Add [red]Regret[/red] to your deck. Obtain 300 [gold]Gold[/gold]. (Pocket the bribe.)

**Scenario 3: Nondescript Trial**
A [orange]nondescript woman with a hard-to-read face[/orange] is charged with [red]theft[/red] and [purple]con-artistry[/purple]. You believe her when she speaks, but ample witnesses attest to her guilt.
  - [gold]GUILTY[/gold]: Add [red]Doubt[/red] to your deck. Gain 2 card rewards.
  - [gold]INNOCENT[/gold]: Add [red]Doubt[/red] to your deck. [gold]Transform[/gold] 2 cards.

**Rejecting initially** triggers an escalation:
The [gold]Grand Arbiter of the Courts[/gold] threatens lethal punishment:
  - [gold]Accept (Give in)[/gold]: You proceed to one of the three trials above.
  - [gold]Double Down[/gold]: Face lethal damage (9999 HP), effectively abandoning your run.
